title: catunaregam malabarica
intro: Catunaregam malabarica, also known as the Malabar catunaregam, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, inflammation, and various respiratory issues. The medicinal properties of Catunaregam malabarica are attributed to its alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. In traditional medicine, Catunaregam malabarica is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and has been used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as to lower fever and alleviate headaches.
